paths.notes: This file itself. Only writable by `code-architect owners bootstrap` or `owners migrate`; never a general edit target.
Config dir for CA-managed lockfiles + contracts. Run.lock is handled atomically by safe-json; humans review anything else.
Package marker for scripts/lib. Mechanical; DA-gated.
Conductor.db connection + parameterized-query helpers. Schema-adjacent; humans review every change.
Mesh-API client (send/ack/capabilities). Contract surface; never bypass-eligible. (Framer carousel send drift incident on 2026-05-10 originated here.)
Carousel staging pipeline shared with daemon. Touches outputs path semantics + downstream send payloads; humans review.
Fallback for future helper modules under scripts/lib (formatters, parsers). Sensitive files (db.py, mesh_client.py, carousel_staging.py) are carved out above.

PM2 entrypoint + action dispatch (the `handlers` whitelist + scheduler + Flask API surface). Every change is behavior-critical; humans review. Note: daemon DOES whitelist actions (lines 122-167) — the intake doc claim that Framer accepts arbitrary action types is inaccurate; `creative_brief` lands because ACD includes it within a payload that another whitelisted handler unwraps, OR via an alias not yet inspected. Investigate before any handler refactor.
Pre-push hook helper enforcing BENCHMARK.md re-run on render-path changes. Bypass-eligible refactor would undermine the gate; humans review.
Package marker. Mechanical; DA-gated.
Catch-all for top-level scripts (build_*, ad-hoc DAG builders). Many are one-shot pipelines that call AI APIs (cost-bearing); humans review. Sub-lanes can be carved out later.

Photo production pipeline (culler, color_grader, retoucher, raw_loader, derivative_generator, batch_exporter). Touches PIL memory budget (300M cap) + source-file invariant (HB#2: never modify originals); humans review.
Graphic design (card_composer, layout_engine, template_library, text_renderer). Brand-rendering surface; humans review.

AI generation clients (Gemini, Midjourney, Veo/Kling/Runway video) + cost_tracker + FOCAL prompts + model_router. Every change touches API spend (HB#3: $25/mo cap) or external API contracts; humans review.
Package marker. Mechanical; DA-gated.

Jinja templates rendered into client-facing carousels. The pre-commit hook (no-unsafe-jinja) blocks `| safe` and `autoescape false` here; CA must not introduce either. Brand-kit JSON also lives here. Humans review every change.
Pydantic schemas for the wide-canvas / render request contract. Contract surface (sender/receiver agreement with ACD/Kai); humans review.
Flask app entry for framer-carousel PM2 service (port 3345). API surface + lifecycle/signal handling (kill_timeout=30s, DRAIN_TIMEOUT_S=25s). Humans review.
Process lifecycle / drain semantics. Crash-restart loop guard (max_restarts=3 / min_uptime=60s) depends on correct draining; humans review.
Core render path. BENCHMARK.md gate (verify-bench.sh) fires on changes here; humans review.
Asset URL/path resolution incl. the `file://` allowlist guard referenced from daemon (asset-policy attack surface). Humans review.
Canonicalization rules for render inputs. Determinism-load-bearing for golden tests; humans review.
Atomic file-write helpers for renderer outputs. Concurrency-safety primitive; humans review.
Boot-time invariant checks. Humans review (silencing one of these is how outages get shipped).
Benchmark harness. Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated. BENCHMARK.md must still be regenerated on any render-path change (see verify-bench.sh).
Color helper utilities. Low blast radius; DA-gated.
Decorative wave utility helpers. Low blast radius; DA-gated.
Service setup script (creates venv, installs deps, installs pre-commit hooks). Bootstrapping behavior; humans review.
Renderer Python deps. Humans review additions/removals.
Renderer dev/test deps. Humans review additions/removals.
Bundled fonts (Inter family, Reross_Quadratic) + brand logos. Licensing-sensitive; humans review additions/removals.
Golden baseline images + fixtures (baseline-wide.png, nintendo-8.json, PILOT_BASELINE.md). Regenerating a golden silently hides regressions; humans review every change.
Renderer pytest tree (test_asset_policy, test_golden, test_hardening, test_lifecycle, conftest). Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated. Golden fixtures carved out above.
Benchmark report regenerated by the require-bench pre-push hook. Hand-edits would defeat the gate; humans review.
Catch-all for future sub-services. Default-deny until a sub-lane is carved out.
Top-level pytest tree (test_asset_indexer, test_carousel_layout, test_carousel_planner, test_llm_client, test_mesh_client, conftest). Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.

Eval harness + carousel-briefs/*.json fixtures (Kameha brand positioning, Malaga listing, Nintendo ecosystem). Briefs encode brand-strategic intent; humans review. (Untracked in main as of HEAD 2a60a1b; defensive policy.)
Prompt source (carousel-planner-system.md). Prompt-engineering surface; humans review every change. (Untracked in main as of HEAD 2a60a1b; defensive policy.)

Framer's domain knowledge (FOCAL framework, color-science, platform-specs, identity, rules, carousel best practices + skill research + workorder). Owned by Framer / KMG-via-ACD; CA never writes. CA may read for graph-walk.
All client deliverables (outputs/{client}/{project}/{date}/). Owned by Framer's runtime; CA never writes. Gitignored anyway.
Framer runtime logs incl. mesh-outbox.jsonl (filesystem backup for mesh sends when bus unreachable). Owned by daemon; CA never writes. Gitignored anyway.

Top-level font assets (jetbrains-mono, outfit, plus-jakarta-sans, space-grotesk, wix-madefor-display, wix-madefor-text). Untracked in main; treated as runtime asset cache. Distinct from services/carousel-renderer/assets which IS tracked and reviewed.
Python virtualenv. Gitignored; runtime only. CA never touches.
Playwright MCP local state. Untracked in tree today; gitignore opportunity flagged separately in CA session 1 triage. CA never writes.
Framer's Claude Code skills (ai-generation, graphic-design, photo-production). Owned by the agent's session; CA never writes.
Framer's Claude Code sub-agent definitions (kai-liaison.md). Owned by the agent's session; CA never writes.
Catch-all for any other Claude Code config (settings.json, etc). Per-agent session state; CA never writes.
PM2 process config (framer + framer-carousel apps, ports 3343 + 3345, drain timeouts, restart guards). Deploy-pipeline territory; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
CI/CD workflows (deploy.yml). Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
Pre-commit + pre-push hooks (no-unsafe-jinja for templates, require-bench for render-path changes). Loosening either gate would defeat invariants; humans review.
Top-level Python deps. Humans review additions/removals.

fallback.notes: Default-deny posture: anything not matched above (CLAUDE.md, loose top-level .jpeg samples like T1-native.jpeg / typography-review-native.jpeg, knowledge/codex-review-*.md untracked drafts, ad-hoc files) requires human review.
